attrs.comment: These data were produced at ESACCI as part of the ESA Cloud CCI project.
attrs.history:
Dataset produced by FUBs FAME-C retrieval system installed at FUB.
Kerchunk file created on 02/23/24
attrs.keywords: satellite, observations, cloud properties, climatology, synergistic, ENVISAT, MERIS, AATSR
attrs.keywords_vocabulary: NASA Global Change Master Directory (GCMD) Science Keywords
attrs.license: ESA CCI Data Policy: free and open access
attrs.project: Climate Change Initiative --- European Space Agency
attrs.standard_name_vocabulary: NetCDF Climate Forecast (CF) Metadata Convention version 18
attrs.summary: This dataset contains monthly Level-3 global cloud property products from satellite observations. Averaged onto a regular grid.
